Financial Performance

Step-by-step savings calculation from historical benchmark to earned savings/losses.

Step Description Value MSSP Median Peer Median
1 Assigned Beneficiaries 16,183 p60 13,159 17,296
2 Historical Benchmark (per capita) $10,435 p24 $11,439 $11,892
3 Regional Adjustment +$-6
4 Prior Savings Adjustment +-
5 Adjustment Category Regional Adjustment
6 Updated Benchmark (per capita) $12,958 p44 $13,279 $13,747
7 Total Benchmark (all beneficiaries) $205,435,256
8 Total Expenditure (all beneficiaries) $200,556,899
9 Per Capita Expenditure (PY) $12,650 p48 $12,693 $13,465
10 Generated Savings / Losses $0 $6,931,306 —
11 Savings Rate 2.37% p29 4.21% 1.71%
12 Minimum Savings Rate (threshold) 2.65%
13 Guardrail Applied —
14 Final Shared Savings Rate 40.00%
15 Final Shared Loss Rate -
16 Earned Savings / Losses $0 $3,685,876 —
Revenue-to-Expense Category High Revenue

Annual per-beneficiary expenditure across benchmark years (BY1–BY3) and the performance year (PY). Includes Parts A and B FFS spending.

Population Segment BY1BY2BY3PY Trend Risk-Adj. Expected Difference

Aged, Non-Dual $8,011 $8,381 $8,458 $11,399 ↑ $12,155 −$756
Total $12,650 $12,693 $13,465

Risk Scores

Hierarchical Condition Category risk scores. A score of 1.0 = national average. Below 1.0 means the population is healthier than average.

CMS-HCC Risk Scores

Population Segment BY1BY2BY3PY Trend Coding Gap MSSP Med.
End-Stage Renal Disease (ESRD) 0.970 0.979 0.959 0.945 → -0.003 0.967
Disabled 1.138 1.119 1.065 1.046 ↓ +0.093 0.934
Aged, Dual-Eligible 0.910 0.982 0.938 0.967 ↑ -0.008 0.954
Aged, Non-Dual 0.988 0.986 0.979 1.008 → -0.044 0.983

Demographic Risk Scores

Demographic-only risk scores (age/sex/Medicaid status). Compared with HCC risk scores, the difference reflects clinical coding intensity.

Population Segment BY3PY
End-Stage Renal Disease (ESRD) — 0.948
Disabled — 0.953
Aged, Dual-Eligible — 0.975
Aged, Non-Dual — 1.052

Risk Redistribution Weights (PY)

Fraction of the ACO's total risk attributable to each population segment.

ESRD Weight 9.6%
Disabled Weight 2.3%
Aged Dual Weight 2.7%
Aged Non-Dual Weight 85.4%

Utilization — Admissions & Visits Rehab Admissions (per 1,000) * 15 ADM_Rehab
Utilization — Admissions & Visits Short-Term Acute Admissions (per 1,000) 191 229 ADM_S_Trm
Utilization — Admissions & Visits SNF Admissions (per 1,000) 41 40 P_SNF_ADM
Utilization — Admissions & Visits SNF Average Length of Stay (days) 30 27 p77 SNF_LOS
Utilization — Admissions & Visits SNF Average Payment per Stay $23,933 $15,338 p92 SNF_PayperStay
Methodology

Data source: MSSP ACO Performance PY2024 (dataset ID: mssp-performance). Vintage: PY2024. Downloaded: 2026-04-13. Rows in source: 476.

MSSP ACO Performance reports financial and quality performance for Accountable Care Organizations participating in the Medicare Shared Savings Program. Savings/losses are calculated against risk-adjusted, regionally-weighted benchmarks.

Full methodology →

MIT License. Free. No ads. No login.
